references.hebrew: אַ֤ל לַֽמְלָכִ֨ים ׀ לְֽמוֹאֵ֗ל אַ֣ל לַֽמְלָכִ֣ים שְׁתוֹ־יָ֑יִן וּ֝לְרוֹזְנִ֗ים (או) [אֵ֣י] שֵׁכָֽר׃
references.english:
Wine is not for kings, O Lemuel;
Not for kings to drink,
Nor any strong drink for princes,

Let the mouth of another praise you, not yours,
The lips of a stranger, not your own.

references.hebrew: הַחֹ֧דֶשׁ הַזֶּ֛ה לָכֶ֖ם רֹ֣אשׁ חֳדָשִׁ֑ים רִאשׁ֥וֹן הוּא֙ לָכֶ֔ם לְחׇדְשֵׁ֖י הַשָּׁנָֽה׃
references.english: This month shall mark for you the beginning of the months; it shall be the first of the months of the year for you.

references.hebrew: עׇזִּ֤י וְזִמְרָת֙ יָ֔הּ וַֽיְהִי־לִ֖י לִֽישׁוּעָ֑ה        זֶ֤ה אֵלִי֙ וְאַנְוֵ֔הוּ        אֱלֹהֵ֥י אָבִ֖י וַאֲרֹמְמֶֽנְהוּ׃
references.english:
YahaYah A shortened form of this deity’s personal name, which is written as y-h-w-h. is my strength and might,bmight In contrast to others “song.”
And has become my deliverance.
This is my God whom I will enshrine;
The God of my father,cmy father Including his household. whom I will exalt.

references.hebrew: כִּ֣י בְ֭תַחְבֻּלוֹת תַּעֲשֶׂה־לְּךָ֣ מִלְחָמָ֑ה וּ֝תְשׁוּעָ֗ה בְּרֹ֣ב יוֹעֵֽץ׃
references.english:
For by stratagems you wage war,
And victory comes with much planning.

references.hebrew: בְּאֵ֣ין אֲ֭לָפִים אֵב֣וּס בָּ֑ר וְרׇב־תְּ֝בוּא֗וֹת בְּכֹ֣חַ שֽׁוֹר׃
references.english:
If there are no oxen the crib is clean,
But a rich harvest comes through the strength of the ox.
